title: Lexter's Cataclysm
description: This Datapack/Mod is inspired by L_enders's Cataclysm. It adds dungeons, new weapons, advancements, strucutres to the Vanilla game.
body:
![f](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16172890510053c2144c0aba868d03849366efac.webp)
## **About** 🛠️
> **THIS DATAPACK/MOD REQUIRES ITS RESOURCEPACK**

> RP on my Account as: **Lexters Cataclysm - RP**

> Lexter's Cataclysm is a Datapack/Mod Inspired by the L_enders Cataclysm mod.
The Datapack adds 14 new custom Items (6 Weapons), 47 new Advancements and 10 new Structures!

> Big Item Texture Credits to: mcl_ender (L_enders Cataclysm Mod), VladVF (L_Ender 's Cataclysm Reimagined Pack), Hummel009 (The Rings of Power Mod)

**DO NOT use Mods like JEI** - They Wont work, because the Mod is just a Packaged Datapack!

### **THIS DATAPACK IS INCOMPATIBLE WITH ANY OTHER DATAPACK/MOD BY LEXTER**




## **Content ✨**

<details>
<summary>Items</summary>


**The Incinnerator:**
 
- Crafting: Smithing-Table: Netherite-Sword, Blaze-Rod, Mystical Power

- Function(s): Right-Click - Damage Facing mobs with flame Strike, Skeak - Damage Mobs in a radius of 2 Blocks. Spammable

**The Void Baswalc:**

- Crafting: Crafting-Table - Shaped: Row 1: Gold-Nugget, Purpur-Block, Amethyst Shard; Row 2: Purpur-Block, Mystical-Energy, Purpur-Block; Row 3: Crying-Obsidian, Purpur-Block, Gold-Nugget

- Function(s): Right-Click - TP Entitys in Radius of 4-10 Blocks to u - Gives them Wither I Effect. Spammable

**The Dark Baswalc:**

- Crafting: Smithing-Table: The Void Baswalc, The Ring of Darkness 

- Function(s): Right-Click - TP Entitys in Radius of 4-12 Blocks to u - Gives them Wither II, Weaknness, Slowness II Effect. Spammable

**The Mechanical Blaster:**

- Crafting: Crafting-Table - Shaped: Row 1: Redstone, Iron-Ingot, Redstone-Block; Row 2: Netherite-Ingot, Mystical Energy, Iron-Ingot; Row 3: Obsidian, Iron-Ingot, Redstone

- Function(s): Right-Click - Damage faicing mobs by 8 hp and Set Blocks, Entitys on Fire. Spammable

**The Ring of Darkness:**

- Crafting: Crafting-Table - Shaped: Row 1: Nothing, Gold-Ingot, Nothing; Row 2: Gold-Ingot, End-Crystal, Gold-Ingot; Row 3; Nothing, Gold-Ingot, Nothing

- Function(s): Right-Click - Damage Mobs in Radius of 4-12 Blocks and give them Slowness Effect. Spammable

**Mystical Energy:**

- Crafting: Crafting-Table - Shapeless: Nether-Star, End-Crystal (You will get 3 per Crafting (VERSION 1.2.3+!!!))

**The Mechanical Saw:**

- Crafting: Crafting-Table - Shaped: Row 1: Any Button, Redstone, Iron Block; Row 2: Redstone Torch, Mystical Energy, Redstone; Row 3: Netherite Ingot, Lever, Any Button

**Ceravnos**

- Crafting: Crafting-Table - Shaped: Row 1: Essence of the Storm, Mystical Energy, Essence of the Storm; Row 2: Chain, Breeze Rod, Chain; Row 3: Same as Row 2

**The Mechanical Rocket Launcher**

- Crafting: Crafting-Table - Shaped: Row 1: Black/red Candle, Iron Ingot, Redstone Block; Row 2: Iron Ingot, Mystical Energy, Iron Ingot; Row 3: Wither Skeleton Skull, iron ingot, Chain

- Function(s): Right-Click - Fire Wither Skull like a wither

**Essence of the Storm**

- dropped by Scylla or Find 1 in Structure: Flying Towers

**Totem of Thunder**

- dropped by Scylla (10%)

- Function(s): Right-Click - gives u Health boost 1 when clicked + regeneration 3 for 2 secs, but u lose one Level every time u click, if ur Level is 0 you will get the wither effect

**Key of Rain**

- Crafting: Crafting-Table - Shaped: Row 1: Nothing, Gold Ingot, Nothing; Row 2: Netherite Ingot, Ender Eye, Iron Ingot; Row 3: Nothing, Soul Sand / Soul Soil, Nothing
  
- Reqired to Summon Scylla

**Shulker Body**

- Consumable item dropped by a Shulker

**Enderman Flesh**

- Consumable item dropped by a Enderman

**Abyssal tear of fear**

- Dropped by Thalassa, Reqired to craft Vythou, Tide Shrine

**Wave Armor Trim**

- An Armor Trim dropped by Thalassa

**Vythou**

- Crafting: Crafting-Table - Shaped: Row 1: Abyssal Tear of Fear in middle; Row 2: Breeze Rod in middle; Row 3: Same as row 2

- Function(s): Like an Axe, but more Attack damage, speed

**Tide Shrine**

- Crafting: Crafting-Table - Shaped: Row 1: Copper Blocks; Row 2: Iron Bars, Abyssal Tear of Fear, Iron Bars; Row 3: Same as row 1

- Function(s): When Placed: Ill give you Regeneration II, Water Breathing in a radius of 40 Blocks

**Endered Soup**

- Crafting: Crafting-Table - Shapeless: Enderman Flesh, Shulker Body, Bowl

**Key of the Sea**

- Reqired to summon Thalassa (same function as "Key of Rain")


- Function(s): Right-Click - Damage mobs in radius od 6 blocks and give them Slowness 255
</details>





<details>
<summary>Achievements</summary>
  
**Vanilla:**
  
There Are many Achievements based on the Vanilla Game like Collecting all dyes.

**Custom:**
  
There are Achievements for Collecting the New Custom Items
</details>


<details>
<summary>Structures</summary>

**Anchient Outpost:**

A small Structure with a lot of Loot and Two Shulkers as Protection

**Anchient Liberary:**

A bigger Structure with very good main Chest and a Secret Elytra Trading Villager

**End Village:**

Now really a Village, but a good Place to Get food

**End Village Ship:**

A End City Ship before the Shulkers Potained it. This Structure Contains Vaults, (Open with Empty Maps) Chests and Villagers

**Farm Traverns:**

These Traverns have 3 Types:

  - Jungle
  - Desert
  - Plains

 They all have a Mob (Camel, Panda, Horse) and a Villager

**Anchient Cemetry:**

Generates in the Pale Garden Biome

There is ONE Skeleton Wolf in each Structure (They can NOT be breedet and can NOT have Babys)

**Flying Towers**

Generates in the Deep Cold Ocean very rare

There is one Essence of Storm, many Chests and Secret Rooms in every Structure (Flying Towers)

**Arena Della Tempesta**

Generates in the Luke Warm Ocean (very, very, rare)

There is a Spawner to summon the "Scylla" Boss (Click on the "Boss(es)" tab to see, how Scylla is Summoned)


**Sunken Nave Delluomo**

Generates in Deep Cold Oceans (very,very,rare)

There is a Spawner to summon the "Thalassa" Boss (Click on the "Boss(es)" tab to see, how Thalassa is Summoned)
</details>



<details>
<summary>Boss(es)</summary>

**Scylla**

- Summoned in "Arena Della Tempesta"

-> Stand min 1 Block infront of the Spawner Model in the middle of the strucutre,

-> Make sure you have the item "Key of Rain", if not, craft it!,

-> Select the Item in your Mainhand and the Boss will Spawn (The boss is Respawnable)

- Reqiured (Optional):
  - Prot 3-4 Full Netherite
  - Sharpness 5 Sword
  - Some Ender Pearls
  - Totem(s) (OPTIONAL)
  - Gaps (Op-Gaps)

----------------------------------------------


**Thalassa**

- Summoned in "Sunken Nave Delluomo"

-> Stand min 1 Block infront of the Spawner Model in the middle of the strucutre,

-> Make sure you have the item "Key of the Sea", if not, craft it!,

-> Select the Item in your Mainhand and the Boss will Spawn (The boss is Respawnable)

- Reqiured (Optional):
  - Prot 3-4 Full Netherite
  - Smite 5 Sword (or Sharpness 5, but Smite is better against dead Mobs)
  - Totem(s) (OPTIONAL)
  - Gaps (Op-Gaps)


</details>




## **Updates ✉️**

There are always small Updates fixing some Bugs. There are Big Updates like 1.2 adding new Content. The First Versions of This Pack are not Really precised, so please use the Latest Versions!
